title: The Crucifix
text: I found a wooden crucifix near the chapel. It feels heavier than it should.

title: A Letter from Elías
text: Elías pressed a sealed letter into my hand. He says it was my father's. I have not yet found the courage to read it.

title: Clara's Ring
text: María Clara's ring — I remember the day I gave it to her in the convent garden. The friars hid it away.

title: The Forbidden Tome
text: A banned book. Its pages speak of reform — of a country that could be free. I understand now why they fear it.

title: Sisa's Remedy
text: Sisa, poor Sisa, gave me a bottle of her brew. She begged me to find her sons. I promised I would try.

title: Tiago's Doubloon
text: Cap. Tiago slipped me a gold doubloon with a wink. 'The friars need not know,' he said.

title: The Relics Return
text: I laid the six relics before María Clara. The quest is done — but I fear the true trial has only just begun.
